title: bupleurum lancifolium var. lancifolium
intro: Bupleurum lancifolium var. lancifolium is a plant species known as a type of Hare's ear or Chinese thunder of heaven, belonging to the family Apiaceae, which includes carrots, parsley, and dill. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum lancifolium var. lancifolium include its ability to alleviate liver and kidney problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Bupleurum lancifolium var. lancifolium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is typically combined with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root to enhance its medicinal properties.
